rationale: Educ. Code §21.033 governs the composition and appointment of the State Board for Educator Certification. It has no relation to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 21.033. STATE BOARD FOR EDUCATOR CERTIFICATION. (a) The State Board for Educator Certification is composed of 15 members.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns educator certification board membership and is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
